tools.name: admin.describeOrganizationConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the Amazon Macie configuration settings for an organization in Organizations.

tools.name: admin.enableOrganizationAdminAccount
tools.description: Designates an account as the delegated Amazon Macie administrator account for an organization in Organizations.

tools.name: admin.listOrganizationAdminAccounts
tools.description: Retrieves information about the delegated Amazon Macie administrator account for an organization in Organizations.

tools.name: admin.updateOrganizationConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the Amazon Macie configuration settings for an organization in Organizations.

tools.name: adminAdminAccountId.disableOrganizationAdminAccount
tools.description: Disables an account as the delegated Amazon Macie administrator account for an organization in Organizations.

tools.name: administrator.disassociateFromAdministratorAccount
tools.description: Disassociates a member account from its Amazon Macie administrator account.

tools.name: administrator.getAdministratorAccount
tools.description: Retrieves information about the Amazon Macie administrator account for an account.

tools.name: allowLists.createAllowList
tools.description: Creates and defines the settings for an allow list.

tools.name: allowLists.deleteAllowList
tools.description: Deletes an allow list.

tools.name: allowLists.getAllowList
tools.description: Retrieves the settings and status of an allow list.

tools.name: allowLists.listAllowLists
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about all the allow lists for an account.

tools.name: allowLists.updateAllowList
tools.description: Updates the settings for an allow list.

tools.name: automatedDiscovery.getAutomatedDiscoveryConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the configuration settings and status of automated sensitive data discovery for an account.

tools.name: automatedDiscovery.updateAutomatedDiscoveryConfiguration
tools.description: Enables or disables automated sensitive data discovery for an account.

tools.name: classificationExportConfiguration.getClassificationExportConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the configuration settings for storing data classification results.

tools.name: classificationExportConfiguration.putClassificationExportConfiguration
tools.description: Creates or updates the configuration settings for storing data classification results.

tools.name: classificationScopes.getClassificationScope
tools.description: Retrieves the classification scope settings for an account.

tools.name: classificationScopes.listClassificationScopes
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about the classification scope for an account.

tools.name: classificationScopes.updateClassificationScope
tools.description: Updates the classification scope settings for an account.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.batchGetCustomDataIdentifiers
tools.description: Retrieves information about one or more custom data identifiers.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.createCustomDataIdentifier
tools.description: Creates and defines the criteria and other settings for a custom data identifier.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.deleteCustomDataIdentifier
tools.description: Soft deletes a custom data identifier.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.getCustomDataIdentifier
tools.description: Retrieves the criteria and other settings for a custom data identifier.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.listCustomDataIdentifiers
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about all the custom data identifiers for an account.

tools.name: customDataIdentifiers.testCustomDataIdentifier
tools.description: Tests a custom data identifier.

tools.name: datasources.describeBuckets
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) statistical data and other information about one or more S3 buckets that Amazon Macie monitors and analyzes for an account.

tools.name: datasources.getBucketStatistics
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) aggregated statistical data about all the S3 buckets that Amazon Macie monitors and analyzes for an account.

tools.name: datasources.searchResources
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) statistical data and other information about Amazon Web Services resources that Amazon Macie monitors and analyzes.

tools.name: findings.createSampleFindings
tools.description: Creates sample findings.

tools.name: findings.getFindings
tools.description: Retrieves the details of one or more findings.

tools.name: findings.getFindingStatistics
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) aggregated statistical data about findings.

tools.name: findings.getSensitiveDataOccurrences
tools.description: Retrieves occurrences of sensitive data reported by a finding.

tools.name: findings.getSensitiveDataOccurrencesAvailability
tools.description: Checks whether occurrences of sensitive data can be retrieved for a finding.

tools.name: findings.listFindings
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about one or more findings.

tools.name: findingsfilters.createFindingsFilter
tools.description: Creates and defines the criteria and other settings for a findings filter.

tools.name: findingsfilters.deleteFindingsFilter
tools.description: Deletes a findings filter.

tools.name: findingsfilters.getFindingsFilter
tools.description: Retrieves the criteria and other settings for a findings filter.

tools.name: findingsfilters.listFindingsFilters
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about all the findings filters for an account.

tools.name: findingsfilters.updateFindingsFilter
tools.description: Updates the criteria and other settings for a findings filter.

tools.name: findingsPublicationConfiguration.getFindingsPublicationConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the configuration settings for publishing findings to Security Hub.

tools.name: findingsPublicationConfiguration.putFindingsPublicationConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the configuration settings for publishing findings to Security Hub.

tools.name: invitations.acceptInvitation
tools.description: Accepts an Amazon Macie membership invitation that was received from a specific account.

tools.name: invitations.createInvitations
tools.description: Sends an Amazon Macie membership invitation to one or more accounts.

tools.name: invitations.declineInvitations
tools.description: Declines Amazon Macie membership invitations that were received from specific accounts.

tools.name: invitations.deleteInvitations
tools.description: Deletes Amazon Macie membership invitations that were received from specific accounts.

tools.name: invitations.getInvitationsCount
tools.description: Retrieves the count of Amazon Macie membership invitations that were received by an account.

tools.name: invitations.listInvitations
tools.description: Retrieves information about the Amazon Macie membership invitations that were received by an account.

tools.name: jobs.createClassificationJob
tools.description: Creates and defines the settings for a classification job.

tools.name: jobs.describeClassificationJob
tools.description: Retrieves the status and settings for a classification job.

tools.name: jobs.listClassificationJobs
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about one or more classification jobs.

tools.name: jobs.updateClassificationJob
tools.description: Changes the status of a classification job.

tools.name: macie.disableMacie
tools.description: Disables Amazon Macie and deletes all settings and resources for a Macie account.

tools.name: macie.enableMacie
tools.description: Enables Amazon Macie and specifies the configuration settings for a Macie account.

tools.name: macie.getMacieSession
tools.description: Retrieves the status and configuration settings for an Amazon Macie account.

tools.name: macie.updateMacieSession
tools.description: Suspends or re-enables Amazon Macie, or updates the configuration settings for a Macie account.

tools.name: macie.updateMemberSession
tools.description: Enables an Amazon Macie administrator to suspend or re-enable Macie for a member account.

tools.name: managedDataIdentifiers.listManagedDataIdentifiers
tools.description: Retrieves information about all the managed data identifiers that Amazon Macie currently provides.

tools.name: master.disassociateFromMasterAccount
tools.description: (Deprecated) Disassociates a member account from its Amazon Macie administrator account. This operation has been replaced by the <link  linkend="DisassociateFromAdministratorAccount">DisassociateFromAdministratorAccount</link> operation.

tools.name: master.getMasterAccount
tools.description: (Deprecated) Retrieves information about the Amazon Macie administrator account for an account. This operation has been replaced by the <link  linkend="GetAdministratorAccount">GetAdministratorAccount</link> operation.

tools.name: members.createMember
tools.description: Associates an account with an Amazon Macie administrator account.

tools.name: members.deleteMember
tools.description: Deletes the association between an Amazon Macie administrator account and an account.

tools.name: members.disassociateMember
tools.description: Disassociates an Amazon Macie administrator account from a member account.

tools.name: members.getMember
tools.description: Retrieves information about an account that's associated with an Amazon Macie administrator account.

tools.name: members.listMembers
tools.description: Retrieves information about the accounts that are associated with an Amazon Macie administrator account.

tools.name: resourceProfiles.listResourceProfileArtifacts
tools.description: Retrieves information about objects that were selected from an S3 bucket for automated sensitive data discovery.

tools.name: resourceProfiles.listResourceProfileDetections
tools.description: Retrieves information about the types and amount of sensitive data that Amazon Macie found in an S3 bucket.

tools.name: resourceProfiles.updateResourceProfileDetections
tools.description: Updates the sensitivity scoring settings for an S3 bucket.

tools.name: resourceProfilesResourceArn.getResourceProfile
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) sensitive data discovery statistics and the sensitivity score for an S3 bucket.

tools.name: resourceProfilesResourceArn.updateResourceProfile
tools.description: Updates the sensitivity score for an S3 bucket.

tools.name: revealConfiguration.getRevealConfiguration
tools.description: Retrieves the status and configuration settings for retrieving occurrences of sensitive data reported by findings.

tools.name: revealConfiguration.updateRevealConfiguration
tools.description: Updates the status and configuration settings for retrieving occurrences of sensitive data reported by findings.

tools.name: tags.listTagsForResource
tools.description: Retrieves the tags (keys and values) that are associated with an Amazon Macie resource.

tools.name: tags.tagResource
tools.description: Adds or updates one or more tags (keys and values) that are associated with an Amazon Macie resource.

tools.name: tags.untagResource
tools.description: Removes one or more tags (keys and values) from an Amazon Macie resource.

tools.name: templates.getSensitivityInspectionTemplate
tools.description: Retrieves the settings for the sensitivity inspection template for an account.

tools.name: templates.listSensitivityInspectionTemplates
tools.description: Retrieves a subset of information about the sensitivity inspection template for an account.

tools.name: templates.updateSensitivityInspectionTemplate
tools.description: Updates the settings for the sensitivity inspection template for an account.

tools.name: usage.getUsageStatistics
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) quotas and aggregated usage data for one or more accounts.

tools.name: usage.getUsageTotals
tools.description: Retrieves (queries) aggregated usage data for an account.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
